# Contributors, Contact & Citation

## Contributors

- [Ji-Eun Byun](https://jieunbyun.github.io/), PhD — <j.byun@imperial.ac.uk>
- Hyeuk Ryu, PhD — <hyeuk.ryu@ga.gov.au>
- [Junho Song](https://systemreliability.wordpress.com/), PhD — <junhosong@snu.ac.kr>

## Contact

- For **technical queries**, contact Dr Ji-Eun Byun or Dr Hyeuk Ryu.
- For **research collaborations**, contact Dr Ji-Eun Byun and Prof. Junho Song.
